description_long: This is a medium-sized, arched wooden storage chest reinforced with dark metal bands and trim. The wood panels have a rich, warm brown tone with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The chest features a prominent metal clasp and lock mechanism at the front, suggesting it is designed to secure valuable or important items. The curved lid is constructed from the same wood and metal materials, with the metal bands providing both structural support and decorative contrast. The sides and back are similarly reinforced, and the overall build suggests durability for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, and the chest sits directly on the ground.
description: A medium-sized, arched wooden chest with dark metal bands and a front clasp lock, featuring a rustic and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wooden lid, dark metal bands, and a central metal clasp lock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched profile, wood grain, and metal reinforcement, with no handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood and metal banding, with no lock or clasp present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arched end and metal ring detail.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, storage room, or workshop
